text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru and I are having<n>lunch
together one day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I'll get luscious, bouncy<n>skin if I eat
this Luscious, Bouncy<n>Pudding?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh! Then what am I supposed to<n>do about my
skin? It's as dry and<n>rough as a paper talisman!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The philosophy of feng shui tells us<n>dry skin is a
surefire sign that great<n>misfortune is just around
the corner!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru seems to be<n>having skin
problems...
